steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: However opens the sentence and directly contradicts the preceding claim that horizontal gene transfer “has rarely been observed among eukaryotes.”

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C identifies the function: by presenting new evidence (“more common”), the sentence implies that the previous perception (“rarely observed”) was inaccurate.
The other three choices misidentify the function: A claims it argues research will fail, B repeats the vertical/horizontal distinction, and D claims it compares organisms.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
